The '''Imperial Reprogramming Institute''' was a [[Prison/Legends|prison]] and insane asylum established by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] on [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]. [[Triclops]] was housed there.<ref name="MMY" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Queen of the Empire]]'' {{Mo}}
*[[Prophets of the Dark Side (novel)|''Prophets of the Dark Side'']] {{Mo}}
